name: Community Development Department
shortDescription: Provides professional social work and community development services to build strong, cohesive communities and transform the social, physical, and economic landscape of Barbados.
intro: To provide the highest quality professional social work in community development services, achieving strong, cohesive communities and in so doing transform the physical, social and economic landscape of Barbados into one that is sustainable, fully developed and socially just.

children.text: To provide the highest quality professional social work in community development services, achieving strong, cohesive communities and in so doing transform the physical, social and economic landscape of Barbados into one that is sustainable, fully developed and socially just.

bodyText: To provide the highest quality professional social work in community development services, achieving strong, cohesive communities and in so doing transform the physical, social and economic landscape of Barbados into one that is sustainable, fully developed and socially just.
